description.unified: Deals 7 attacks to nearby enemies within a circular area, then deals M.DMG to enemies in a frontal area and inflicts Down for [3 sec->1.5sec].

Deals M.DMG to all enemies and inflicts Stun for [2 sec->0.5sec]. Upon casting, enters [Arcane Crystal Awakening] for [15 sec->10sec], increasing ATK SPD by [300->35%]. While active, releases a shockwave every [2 sec->1.3sec], dealing M.DMG to nearby enemies [(removed) stunning them for 1 sec].

Summons an Arcane Crystal, dealing M.DMG to enemies in a frontal line, then causes an explosion that deals additional M.DMG. Enemies hit are inflicted with [Arcane Crystal Curse] for 5sec, and when Kirze attacks enemies under [Arcane Crystal Curse], applies stacks of [Arcane Crystal Energy]. [Arcane Crystal Curse]: Reduces ATK SPD by [200->10%], and after 5sec, deals M.DMG.
Changes base Mana Recovery per sec to 150, increases Crit Chance by [200->250], and increases the duration of CCs that all allies inflict on Bosses by [30%->15%].

dark.unified: Each use increases DMG by 15%. This effect can stack up to 10 times.

light.unified: Increases Mana Cost by 1000 but increases duration by 4 sec.

dark.unified: Increases ATK SPD by an additional 35%.

light.unified: [Arcane Crystal Curse] additionally reduces ATK SPD by [300->10%].
At the start of battle, increases damage dealt to non-hero enemies by [25%->65%] for [20 sec->10 sec].

description.unified: [Slash, Blade of Judgment! ] Increases DMG by {0}% and reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000].
[Disperse, Crystal Haze!] Increases ATK SPD of all allies by [additional {0}->10%] and increases DEF Penetration of all allies by [250->{0}].

[Bloom, Crimson Flower!] [Increases DMG by {0}%, and gains 1 additional stack when [Arcane Crystal Energy] is stacked->Decreases Cooldown by 30%, and gaining 1 stack of [Arcane Crystal Energy] has a {0}% chance to add 3 additional stacks].
[End to Evil Deeds!] Increases [Crit DMG by 32%->Crit Chance by an additional 250], and changes the CC duration increase effect to {0}%.

dark.unified: Increases Crit DMG by [40%->30%] and DEF Penetration by 150. This effect increases by 2 times after Kirze attacks the enemy 100 times.

description.unified: Greatly increases the effect range of [Bloom, Crimson Flower!]. Normal and Skill attacks have a [4%->8%] chance to deal additional M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK. DMG is increased by 2 times against Bosses.

Summons the Soul of Judgment Edge, Elicipira for 10sec, changing the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to [10%->20%] and reducing [All DMG taken by 40%->M.DMG taken by 50%].

1.from: For the duration of Skill, Increases ATK by 50%.
1.to: For the duration of Skill, increases ATK by 45%.
1.unified: For the duration of Skill, increases ATK by [50%->45%].

2.from: Increases the duration by 5 sec and changes the activation chance of Judgment Edge, Elicipira to 15%.
2.to: Changes the activation chance of Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to 30%.
2.unified: Changes the activation chance of Elicipira’s additional M.DMG to [15%->30%].
